Custom hook that throws when used outside its required provider

nodes.label: Custom Next.js Breaking-Changes Notice
nodes.rationale: This project's Next.js version diverges from the model's training data (APIs, conventions, file structure). Instructs any coding agent to consult node_modules/next/dist/docs/ and heed deprecation notices before writing code, to avoid generating code against outdated/incorrect assumptions about Next.js behavior.

nodes.label: Graphify Knowledge-Graph Governance Rules
nodes.rationale: Mandates that graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md be read before any source file reads, grep/glob searches, or codebase questions, treating the generated knowledge graph as the primary map of the codebase over raw file exploration; prefers graphify query/path/explain over grep for cross-module relationship questions; requires graphify update . after code changes to keep the graph current at no extra API cost.
